raw_text:
<think>
The user asks: "packet_id=HVSMW2-9038DCC84E958E313876
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-D1D2AC6B
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
Return the three-line status record."

We need to output a plain text record with three key=value lines, fields in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move.

The user gave us those values: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-D1D2AC6B, blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it.

We need to output:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-D1D2AC6B
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Make sure no extra lines or headings. That is it.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-D1D2AC6B
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
